Description: Retrieve databundle from Zenodo via ``retrieve_databundle_light``; recommended for the first run.
Retrieve cost data from technology-data into ``resources/costs.csv``; ``false`` uses ``data/costs.csv``.
Build cutouts via ``build_cutout``; requires CDS API key and uses ``snapshots`` and ``countries``.
Show progress bars during long downloads and builds.
Use ``data/custom_busmap_elec_s{simpl}_{clusters}.csv`` instead of the clustering busmap algorithm.
